## Product checklist

### Identity & branding

<!-- SF Symbol: app.badge -->
- [ ] App icon — all required sizes
- [ ] App name / bundle id finalized
- [ ] Accent / brand color defined
- [ ] About screen / version info

### Appearance

<!-- SF Symbol: circle.lefthalf.filled -->
- [ ] Light mode reviewed
- [ ] Dark mode reviewed
- [ ] Respects system appearance setting
- [ ] Dynamic type / font scaling
- [ ] High-contrast pass

### Settings & preferences

<!-- SF Symbol: gearshape -->
- [ ] Settings / preferences screen
- [ ] Settings persist across launches
- [ ] Sensible defaults on first run
- [ ] Reset-to-defaults option

### Core functionality

<!-- SF Symbol: checklist -->
- [ ] {{primary feature}}
- [ ] {{secondary feature}}
- [ ] Empty states designed
- [ ] Error / failure states handled
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts

### Accessibility

<!-- SF Symbol: accessibility -->
- [ ] Labels for controls / VoiceOver
- [ ] Full keyboard navigation
- [ ] Color contrast meets AA
- [ ] Touch / click targets adequate

### Data & reliability

<!-- SF Symbol: externaldrive -->
- [ ] Persistence layer stable
- [ ] Automatic backups / recovery
- [ ] No data loss on edge cases
- [ ] Migration path for schema changes

### Quality

<!-- SF Symbol: checkmark.seal -->
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual QA pass
- [ ] No console warnings
- [ ] Performance acceptable

### Docs

<!-- SF Symbol: book -->
- [ ] README
- [ ] Changelog / release notes
- [ ] Screenshots
- [ ] License

### Release

<!-- SF Symbol: shippingbox -->
- [ ] Version bumped
- [ ] Signed
- [ ] Notarized / verified
- [ ] Artifact built and tested
- [ ] Tag + release published
